headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Wynn Resorts, Lowers Price Target to $141
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Trey Bowers   maintains Wynn Resorts (NASDAQ:WYNN) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $142 to $141.
